description: Qing Dynasty ancient architectural complex, showcasing immigrant culture, and understanding the historical and cultural roots of Chongqing.
Famous snack street in Chongqing, featuring authentic local delicacies such as Chongqing noodles and spicy sour noodles.
Classic activity of taking a night cruise on the Yangtze River and Jialing River to admire the dazzling night views on both shores.
Iconic architectural complex in Chongqing, featuring stilted building style and brilliant night views, offering an experience of the charm of the mountain city.
The best observation deck in Chongqing, providing a 360-degree panoramic view of Yuzhong Peninsula and an excellent spot to enjoy the mountain city's night scenery.

Municipal-level art gallery in Chongqing, showcasing contemporary art pieces, located in the core business district of Jiefangbei.

attraction_name: Mountain City Trail · Jianxing Slope Grand Stairway
description: Chongqing's characteristic mountain city trail, offering an experience of the mountain city's lifestyle of climbing slopes and stairs, perfect for urban hiking.
A treasure trove of Chongqing's history and culture, featuring exquisite Three Gorges artifacts to understand Chongqing's profound history.
The most representative mountain city neighborhood in Chongqing, showcasing the old Chongqing's street life and architectural characteristics.
